corrections.note: Verse number 2 has been captured inline before κεκρατηκέναι; printed text has comma after στόλου and no inline numeral.
Left-margin line/verse numeral leaked into body text.
Inline numeral before οἱ is not part of text.
Inline numeral before ὅθεν is not part of text.

corrections.current: δόξαν, λέγω δὲ τὴν ἀρχιερωσύνην, δεῦρο νῦν ἐλήλυθα
corrections.correct: δόξαν, λέγω δὲ τὴν ἀρχιερωσύνην, δεῦτερον νῦν ἐλήλυθα
corrections.note: Printed text reads δεῦτερον, not δεῦρο.
Inline numeral before ἕκαστα is not part of text.
Printed text has περιστατιμένου split across lines, not περιστατιαῶντος.
Printed text reads εὐαπάντητον; transcript spacing is acceptable but accent should be on α as given. No change to letters.
Inline numeral before ἰσχρὰ is not part of text.
Witness siglum A omitted after lemma.
Apparatus reading has gamma, not omicron: προγεγoνως.
Accent visible on printed form ἀφηγεῖται in apparatus.

uncertain.note: Transcript has εὐ- απάντητον with a space after line break; image shows line-break hyphenation of εὐ- / απάντητον. Likely acceptable depending on transcription policy.

notes: Running head matches. Main body errors are several leaked inline numerals and two substantive misreadings: δεῦτερον for δεῦρο, and περιστατιμένου for corrupted περιστατιαῶντος. Apparatus mostly matches, with omission of siglum A after Αλκιμος and one misread in προγεγονως.
